ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., cognitive, behavioral) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher in charge of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the participant is part of */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the participant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant's information was last updated */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the trial belongs to */,
  "trial_type" TEXT /* Type of trial (e.g., response, accuracy) */,
  "correct_response" TEXT /* Correct response for the trial */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial was last updated */,
  "trial_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trial in seconds */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of stimulus used in the trial (e.g., image, audio) */,
  "stimulus_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the stimulus in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the response belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who made the response */,
  "response" TEXT /* Participant's response (e.g., j, l) */,
  "accuracy" INTEGER /* Accuracy of the response (1 for correct, 0 for incorrect) */,
  "reaction_time" INTEGER /* Reaction time of the participant in milliseconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was last updated */,
  "response_latency" INTEGER /* Latency of the response in milliseconds */,
  "accuracy_type" TEXT /* Type of accuracy metric used (e.g., binary, continuous) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_types" (
  "trial_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial type */,
  "trial_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial type (e.g., response, accuracy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trial type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_designs" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimental design */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the design belongs to */,
  "design_name" TEXT /* Name of the experimental design */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experimental design */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experimental design was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experimental design was last updated */,
  "design_description" TEXT /* Description of the experimental design */,
  "design_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the experimental design (e.g., sample size, trial duration) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_designs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experimental design the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES experiment_designs ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's information was last updated */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the experiment (e.g., web, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the analytics belong to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., accuracy, reaction time) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics data was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics data was last updated */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric being tracked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
